reviews.author: Prakash Natarajan
reviews.text: It's worth a visit. The cable car ride is great very long and so high but view is worth it. Golden Bridge just as you see it in pictures good experience. Loved the French Village so much to see and plenty of places to stop for lunch. Bana Hills gets busy with tour groups by 12noon which makes it harder to move around as freely and take photos. We went early, there about 9am and left about 1pm but could quite easily have stayed longer as loads to do and see.

reviews.author: Richard A Francisco
reviews.text: Ba Na Hills has a massive cable car network. It goes very high up as the hills are actually mountains. The top of the cable car network can get pretty foggy and the ride itself is quite scenic. You might have to transfer cable cars at some point especially if you plan to go up to the French village.

reviews.author: Food Date
reviews.text: The cable car ride from the SunWorld entrance uphill to the golden bridge is quite safe and beautiful. It takes about 20-25 minutes one way uphill. It is said to be the world's longest cable car, but it also has drawbacks like artificial environments, potential for fog, and high prices. If you enjoy theme park experiences, photo opportunities, and specific attractions, Ba Na Hills might be a great one-time visit. Or if you have kids along with you definitely. It takes the whole day almost if you gave do this activity including the golden hands bridge, lunch, French village, SunWorld, le jardine gardens. Tickets to be booked in advance. Any of the travel sites like Klook, viator etc have tickets and you may find discounts. Local tourist vendors and agencies charge higher. This attraction is about 45 minutes from the city. Ba Na Hills cable car tickets typically cost 900,000 VND (around $37 USD) for adults (above 1.4m) and 750,000 VND (around $31 USD) for children (1-1.4m). Children below 1 meter are usually free. These prices are for the cable car ride itself, and sometimes include other amenities like a buffet lunch. We booked through Klook and got a 10% discount. If you need to add lunch or some of the paid tourist attractions you need to select your tickets accordingly The day route runs from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM, while the night route operates from 3:00 PM to 10:00 PM. However, it's advisable to arrive early to fully experience all the attractions, especially if you want to avoid large crowds and enjoy the attraction and its beauty in full. We arrived around 12 and couldn’t see in totality.

reviews.author: Skyworld
reviews.text: The Ba Na Hills Cable Car is an outstanding experience and one of the highlights of visiting Ba Na Hills. The ride offers breathtaking panoramic views of dense forests, mountains, and waterfalls, making the journey as memorable as the destination. The cable car system is modern, smooth, and very well maintained, with clear safety measures in place. The cabins are spacious and comfortable, allowing visitors to enjoy the views without discomfort. The entire process is well organized, with efficient boarding, helpful staff, and clear signage at stations. The ride duration is perfect for sightseeing and photography. Overall, the Ba Na Hills Cable Car is a must-do experience. It combines adventure, scenic beauty, and world-class engineering, making it an unforgettable part of the Ba Na Hills visit.

reviews.author: Vidisha Sarawagi
reviews.text: One of the longest cable car and so well planned. Would highly recommend you take the WOW PASS. For the cable car as well as the indoor theme park. The weather was superb and it definitely will rain.

reviews.author: Shantis Tae
reviews.text: The cable cars alone 🚡 were a unique and pretty incredible experience. Hard to capture in photos but the longest line (25 minutes?) felt like being transported into a parallel world – or into heaven!

reviews.author: Eugene Tasker
reviews.text: I would give it 5 stars. Except the ticket seller told me I had to buy a silver pass to be able to get on and off at various stations. An extra 600 000 VND for 2. Nope the regular ticket also allows that. So don’t fall for the upselling. Just pay the regular price as it makes no difference.

reviews.author: Karthik M Y
reviews.text: Collect the map and study the map before coming here. Although the view from cable car is splendid. U won't even know how 25mins passes

reviews.author: Paul Y
reviews.text: very special and nice experience of cable car. the day I went the weather is not too good. but the service is excellent. 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻if you visit here. this should be one of the must try activities.

reviews.author: Manuel Mesquita
reviews.text: Completely overprice, it’s a very small miniature of Disney, when the weather is not ideal it’s a complete fail, cold and foggy, complete waste of money and time. It should be closed or price reduced, the experience is really bad Go for the Vietnam original and heritage sites instead, they are just perfect

reviews.author: Aziana Nana
reviews.text: Thrilling and safe ride. Roughly 20-30 mins in duration

reviews.author: Danny Yang
reviews.text: I will come back again this good place ☺️

reviews.author: Simon Paul
reviews.text: 6 km ride up to the French village Bana hills was a lifetime experience

reviews.author: ですV
reviews.text: Everything was seamless. We went on a weekday and there was no queue. We were quite worried as we read online that the wait can get quite crazy even on weekdays. Glad to say that we were lucky!

reviews.author: Zahi Afsar
reviews.text: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Stunning experience with a few things to improve The Bà Nà Hills Cable Car is absolutely breathtaking the views over the mountains, forests, and waterfalls are out of this world. It’s one of the most scenic and memorable cable car rides I’ve ever taken, and the engineering is truly impressive. However, a few things could be better. The area really needs a clearer, more readable map and more signs to help people navigate it’s easy to get turned around. The queuing system also needs improvement. In the morning especially, things can get chaotic, and it felt like a bit of a free-for-all with people pushing ahead. That said, the staff were fantastic friendly, professional, and helpful throughout the visit. Overall, still a great experience. I’m giving it 4 stars and would definitely recommend it, especially if you’re visiting Da Nang.

reviews.author: Sandra Pitter
reviews.text: Amazing journey in the cablecar. Magnificent scenery on the way up. Lush forests and waterfalls. On arrival city in the clouds is breathtaking. An amazing feat in engineering. Can't say enough about this beautiful place

reviews.author: nisith aukkarapattanakul
reviews.text: Great Cable car experience Very stable cable car and safe Nice view !!!!!

reviews.author: Echo Hu
reviews.text: It was incredible! It was very long with absolutely amazing views. The shaking cable car added some excitement to the ride. It was so windy, it shook a lot. Although, rain leaked in so I was very cold. It was a very cold and exciting journey from the bottom to the top of Ba Na hills.

reviews.author: Marta Skubáková
reviews.text: The ride itself was fine (very expensive though), but on the way back we were stuck in the park for almost an hour. Apparently the car in the evening only leaves once an hour, which was not written down anywhere in the park. It was very cold to wait outside for so long. They should point out the times more obviously, there were more people with us who were confused and lost.

reviews.author: Jack Boyden
reviews.text: Great climb and view over Da Nang. However expensive for Vietnam and very far away. Can get similar views nearer the city

reviews.author: KhunKhao : real experience TH.
reviews.text: "I came here with high expectations, but I lost my belongings. The staff here were uncooperative, refusing to let me see the CCTV footage and offering no assistance other than to repeatedly say 'no, no, no.' I'm very disappointed with the service here. I was really looking forward to visiting this place, but now I feel let down and don't want to come back. This experience has left me feeling very negative."

reviews.author: Fiachra Browne
reviews.text: Avoid this place at all costs. Completely overpriced and terrible customer service. We came here to go on the alpine coaster but it was closed. We were not informed of this. The golden bridge was so crowded that you could barely walk over it. It cost is 33 euro each to walk around around and look at buildings. Nearly everything inside you had to pay for and was very expensive. When we found out the alpine coaster was closed we talked to customer service and they were completely useless. They told us it is not their problem. They have thousands of customers everyday but could not help 2 very disappointed customers. Do not support this overpriced business

reviews.author: mayuri patel
reviews.text: You can see city skyline from a bird's-eye perspective. World's Longest Non-Stop Cable Car: The cable car spans 5.8 kilometers (3.6 miles) and ascends 1,487 meters (4,879 feet), making it a truly unique experience.

reviews.author: Supriya Kulkarni
reviews.text: This system is very efficient and gives an extraordinary experience to the visitors

reviews.author: Anupama Basumatary
reviews.text: Wonderful experience to ride in the cable car through clouds. Lovely time in Dana Hills. Love this ride. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Imran Virani
reviews.text: Scary - as when we travelled the weather was bad . I find it really expensive

reviews.author: S
reviews.text: The cable car journey takes around 20 mins so it's nice to get a cable car to yourself (only when it's quiet) - views were lovely :)

reviews.author: Chirag Kathuria
reviews.text: Wonderful experience of having a journey through this cable car, one must do if you are in Danang.

reviews.author: Nuch Suppanuch
reviews.text: Nice experience, the ride took around 20 minutes.
